homepage.description: As a leader in China's pharmaceutical equipment manufacturing, Canaan offers comprehensive OSD Integrated Solutions, including granulation, tablet compression, and packaging. We also provide OEB Integrated Solutions, Water Systems, Intelligent Warehousing, API Integrated Solutions, and Pharmaceutical Research Services.

About us
FOCUS ON HEALTH
VALUE
STRIVE FOR HUMAN HEALTH!
Zhejiang Canaan Technology Limited is the first company in the field of solid dosage equipment manufacturing to be listed on the A-share market and a prominent player in China’s pharmaceutical equipment manufacturing industry. Canaan can provide OSD Integrated solution including pre-treatment, granulation, blending, tablet press, capsule filling, coating, packaging. Canaan could also provide OEB Integrated Solution, Water System Solution, Intelligent Warehouse Solution, API Integrated Solution, Pharmaceutical Research Service etc..

Latest News
Canaan Focus / 1
Canaan Integrated Line Supports Successful PIC/S GMP Certification in Indonesia
An important partner of Canaan Technology, a leading pharmaceutical manufacturer based in Singapore, has recently announced that its newly built facility in Indonesia has successfully achieved PIC/S GMP certification. This milestone confirms the company’s capability to meet stringent international regulatory standards—and highlights the robustness and consistency of Canaan’s integrated line solutions in highly regulated environments. ABOUT US
Focus on health value, Strive for human health!
Home - Company -
About Us
Focus on
Health Value
Zhejiang Canaan Technology Limited was found in 2000 and is headquartered in Wenzhou City’s Yongjia Industrial Park. It is the first company in the field of solid dosage equipment manufacturing to be listed on the A-share market and a prominent player in China’s pharmaceutical equipment manufacturing industry.
INNOVATION AND R&D
2 R&D CENTERS
Zhejiang Provincial Engineering Research Center
Zhejiang High-Tech Enterprise R&D Center
2 RESEARCH INSTITUTES
Zhejiang Canaan Solid Dosage High Containment Continuous Production Equipment (Technology)
Key Enterprise Research Institute
Nanjing Pharmacy Research Institute
